title: nassella duriuscula
intro: Nassella duriuscula, also known as Needle and Thread grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nassella duriuscula include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
